description: You are the lead editor for the 'Holloway Family Heritage' book. Using the raw draft at /home/ga/Documents/manuscript_draft.odt and the list of key terms at /home/ga/Documents/terms_to_index.json, format the manuscript. Apply 'Heading 1' style to the chapter title 'Chapter 4: The Crossing', add page numbers to the footer, and mark at least one occurrence of each term from the JSON list as an index entry. At the end of the document, insert a page break followed by the title 'Index' (Heading 1 style) and generate the Alphabetical Index. Save the finalized document as /home/ga/Documents/Holloway_Chapter4_Indexed.odt.
